---
title: "Luís Assunção"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
listing:
  id: post-listing
  contents:
    - posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: custom
  template: listing.ejs
  fields: [date, title]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
---
